notes: 限流不再装死:Claude 接口限流时,卡片会明确标注「限流中·显示某时刻的数据」并给出恢复时间,数字不再悄悄冻结让人以为刷新失效;多账号刷新改为单探针,不再连环触发限流,恢复更快;重启后先展示上次成功的额度数据,不再空白等待;面板底栏常驻显示当前版本号。
notes_en: Rate limiting is now visible: when Claude's API throttles requests, cards clearly say "rate limited — data from …" with a recovery time instead of silently freezing. Multi-account refresh probes with a single request instead of hammering the endpoint, so it recovers faster. After a restart, your last known usage shows right away instead of blank cards. The panel footer now always shows the app version.
